name: Heated Battle Mode: Automatic Artistry
description: In The Cat's Tail, there will be a regularly scheduled event that uses special Heated Battle Mode rules.\nRules for this period:\nSelect characters specially dedicated to this mode to build a team and enhance them. Characters will automatically battle!

name: Where Waves Meet the Reef
description: You and Paimon receive a letter from the Curatorium of Secrets. Nefer seems to have a commission that only you can handle...

name: Stygian Onslaught
description: A strange Ley Line Disturbance has once again appeared, this time in Liyue's Sal Terrae. You must breach the depths of this unpredictable Domain, for only by defeating powerful foes can the turmoil be quelled... Of course, where danger awaits, so too do extraordinary treasures...

name: The Forge Realm's Temper: Game of Wits
The Stilled Interstice of a Thousand Winds
description: The gentle sea breeze carries the scent of fine wine through the bustling port.\nYet there are places that even the ever-present wind cannot reach, or rather, it chooses not to.\nShould one choose to follow a secluded path to the tranquil mountain sanatorium, what might await — peaceful rest, or an adventure beyond mortal imagination?

name: Rapid Capture
description: One day, you and Paimon seem to hear someone arguing near the Fountain of Lucine...

name: Cosmic Data Roaming
